display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Bricolage Grotesque 800, uppercase, tight-set, ceiling 5rem.

body.purpose: Reading copy, capped 65–75ch, biased to ink.

label.purpose: JetBrains Mono uppercase, ≥0.12em tracking. Every label, caption, index, eyebrow.

shadows.name: hard-offset
shadows.purpose: The only shadow. Zero blur. Bezel/preview-frame hover — a print proof lifted off the stack.

motion.name: ease-fluid
motion.purpose: Default easing for every state transition and the rise reveal.

motion.name: rise
motion.purpose: Editorial slide-up reveal. No blur. Honors prefers-reduced-motion (instant, opacity 1).

components.name: Primary Button (hero)
components.description: The hero submit. Ink rectangle, mono label, vermilion on hover with arrow nudge.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.6rem; height:68px; padding:0 32px; background:#131210; color:#F3F2EC; border:1.5px solid #131210; border-radius:0; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.12em; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1),border-color .2s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1),color .2s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1),transform .12s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#E23A1A; border-color:#E23A1A; color:#fff; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-trail { display:inline-flex; transition:transform .2s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover .ds-btn-trail { transform:translateX(3px); }

components.name: Plan CTA (primary)
components.description: Pricing primary action. Vermilion fill, deepens on hover.
components.css: .ds-cta-primary { padding:12px 24px; background:#E23A1A; color:#fff; border:1.5px solid #E23A1A; border-radius:0; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1),border-color .2s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1); } .ds-cta-primary:hover { background:#BF2E0F; border-color:#BF2E0F; }

components.name: Outline CTA
components.description: Secondary action. Ink border, inverts to ink fill on hover.
components.css: .ds-cta-outline { padding:12px 24px; background:#fff; color:#131210; border:1.5px solid #131210; border-radius:0; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; cursor:pointer; transition:background .2s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1),color .2s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1); } .ds-cta-outline:hover { background:#131210; color:#F3F2EC; }

components.name: Underline Input
components.description: Default field — underline only, vermilion focus. Mono uppercase label above.
components.css: .ds-field { display:block; } .ds-field-label { display:block; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.68rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.18em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#5E5A52; margin-bottom:0.5rem; } .ds-field-input { width:100%; background:transparent; border:none; border-bottom:1px solid #D8D6CC; border-radius:0; padding:8px 0; color:#131210; font-family:'Hanken Grotesk',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:1rem; transition:border-color .2s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1); } .ds-field-input:focus { outline:none; border-bottom-color:#E23A1A; } .ds-field-input:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #E23A1A; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Bezel Card
components.description: Preview frame. Flat hairline at rest; ink border + hard-offset shadow on hover.
components.css: .ds-bezel { background:#fff; border:1px solid #D8D6CC; border-radius:0; padding:1.5rem; transition:border-color .25s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1),box-shadow .25s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1); } .ds-bezel:hover { border-color:#131210; box-shadow:6px 6px 0 -1px #D8D6CC; } .ds-bezel-inner { font-family:'Hanken Grotesk',system-ui,sans-serif; color:#131210; }

components.name: Eyebrow
components.description: Brand metadata mark — mono caption with a vermilion tick. Deliberate voice, never per-section scaffolding.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.6rem; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.16em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#5E5A52; } .ds-eyebrow::before { content:''; width:1.75rem; height:1.5px; background:#E23A1A; }

narrative.overview: Signet is set like a letterpress broadsheet rendered for the browser — the International Typographic (Swiss) style, committed without apology. Warm bone paper, near-black warm ink, and a single saturated vermilion as the stamp: accent, emphasis, and full stop in one. Whitespace is structured by hairline rules and a strict grid, not left empty. Monospace carries every piece of metadata. The system is deliberately light — no dark mode, no auto-invert — because the bone-and-ink contrast is the identity. Restraint is the product argument: the tool promises 'looks like your design team made it,' so the surface must read as the work of someone with taste.
keyCharacteristics: Warm bone paper (#F3F2EC), warm near-black ink (#131210), one vermilion stamp (#E23A1A)
Zero border-radius — every corner is sharp
Monospace (JetBrains Mono) for all metadata; grotesque display (Bricolage) for headlines
Hairline rules (#D8D6CC) and grid structure instead of boxes and shadows
Hard, blur-free offset shadow as the only elevation gesture

rules.name: The One Stamp Rule
rules.body: Vermilion is the only saturated color and appears on ≤10% of any screen. Accent and punctuation, never a large fill (CTAs aside). A second accent is forbidden.

rules.name: The Locked-Light Rule
rules.body: The system is light, always. color-scheme: light is explicit; prefers-color-scheme is never honored. No dark mode, no auto-invert.

rules.name: The Mono-Metadata Rule
rules.body: Every label, caption, index, and eyebrow is JetBrains Mono, uppercase, wide-tracked (≥0.12em). Metadata never borrows the body or display face.

rules.name: The Eyebrow-Discipline Rule
rules.body: The eyebrow is a deliberate brand mark, not section scaffolding. Use it sparingly as voice — never stamp one over every section.

rules.name: The Hard-Offset Rule
rules.body: Shadows have zero blur. Depth is a printed offset, never a soft glow. Blurred drop-shadows and glassmorphism are forbidden.

dos: Do keep vermilion (#E23A1A) to ≤10% of any screen — accent and punctuation only.
Do set every corner sharp (radius 0). Sharpness is identity.
Do render all metadata in JetBrains Mono, uppercase, ≥0.12em tracking.
Do structure whitespace with hairline rules (#D8D6CC) and the grid.
Do convey depth with the blur-free Hard Offset shadow and tonal layering.
Do bias body text toward ink (#131210); verify ≥4.5:1 on bone (WCAG AA).
donts: Don't ship the generic SaaS template: no gradient heroes, no identical card grids, no rounded corners, no Inter-on-white.
Don't stamp the eyebrow or any tracked-uppercase kicker over every section.
Don't clutter: no dense feature walls. One clear idea per viewport.
Don't introduce a second saturated accent. Vermilion is the only stamp.
Don't add dark mode or honor prefers-color-scheme.
Don't use blurred drop-shadows or glassmorphism — shadows have zero blur.
Don't let display headings exceed 5rem or set tighter than -0.04em.
